title: Autonomous Event-Driven Multi-Agent Orchestration for Enterprise AI at Scale
summary: Autonomous Event-Driven Multi-Agent Orchestration for Enterprise AI at Scale
whyItMatters: Enterprise AI aims to move toward continuous event monitoring, detection, and action across specialist agents, yet existing multi-agent systems largely assume discrete request-response workflows and remain underexplored at enterprise scale.
